title: phyllanthus nobilis var. antillanus
intro: Phyllanthus nobilis var. antillanus, also known as the West Indian Phyllanthus, is a plant species belonging to the Phyllanthaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The plant is reported to have several health benefits, including reducing liver damage, improving immune function, and exhibiting antiviral activity against the hepatitis B virus. Phyllanthus nobilis var. antillanus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine practices.
